title: Day 24 Reflection — Graduation
description: Final reflection in the FrontForge React Interview Track. Honest self-assessment across all five mock rounds and your graduation readiness.

prompts.question: Rate yourself 1–5 on all eight self-evaluation categories. Which two are strongest and which two need the most work?
prompts.guidance: JavaScript, React, TypeScript, Redux, Performance, Machine Coding, Project Discussion, Communication.

prompts.question: Round 3 machine coding: did you finish MVP in 60 minutes? If not, where did time go?
prompts.guidance: Same honesty as Day 21–22 — time management is interview skill.

prompts.question: Round 4 project discussion: how did you explain FrontForge JSON renderer and your refactored project?
prompts.guidance: What landed well? What question stumped you?

prompts.question: Looking back at Week 1 vs today — what is the single biggest skill you gained?
prompts.guidance: Be specific: not just learned React but can explain/build/debug under pressure.

prompts.question: You graduated. What is your first action in the next 48 hours — application, portfolio, or focused drill?
prompts.guidance: Commit to one concrete next step. Interviews are practice.
